response: Founded in 1861, the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) is ranked as the number one university in the world. With an acceptance rate of just 3.9%, it is highly selective, catering to approximately 11,500 students. The university boasts a faculty of 1,069 and has produced 98 Nobel laureates, supported by a substantial endowment of $24.6 billion. Tuition at MIT is $57,590 per year.
